title: CEO Ron Zabel hosts the first Cryptool AMA
content_html:
CEO Ron Zabel hosted the first Cryptool AMA today, with the first public look at several upcoming modules.

The session is now on the Cryptool YouTube channel for anyone who could not attend live. It covers the product vision, the modules in development and answers to community questions.

More AMAs and product walkthroughs will follow as the modules go live.
author: Cryptool
